title: Surgeon Vacancy at Jupiter Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Jupiter Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jupiter Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Surgeon to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Jupiter Hospital:
Jupiter Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jupiter Hospital!
